name: Audit Archive (7-Year Retention)
description: Archives audit partitions older than 7 years to JSONL files in /files/audit-archives/. Runs on 2nd of each month.

parameters.query:
-- Find partitions older than 7 years
SELECT 
  tablename as partition_name,
  SUBSTRING(tablename FROM 'chat_query_logs_(\d{4}_\d{2})') as year_month
FROM pg_tables
WHERE schemaname = 'audit'
  AND tablename LIKE 'chat_query_logs_%'
  AND tablename != 'chat_query_logs'
  AND TO_DATE(
    SUBSTRING(tablename FROM 'chat_query_logs_(\d{4}_\d{2})'),
    'YYYY_MM'
  ) < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 years')
ORDER BY tablename;

=-- Export partition to JSONL format (all rows)
SELECT row_to_json(t)::text as json_row
FROM audit.{{ $json.partition_name }} t
ORDER BY created_at;

=-- Get row count before dropping for verification
SELECT COUNT(*) as archived_rows FROM audit.{{ $('Prepare Archive Data').first().json.partition_name }};

=-- Drop the archived partition (data is safely in file)
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit.{{ $('Prepare Archive Data').first().json.partition_name }};
